runs.text: I am writing to apply for the Code for Good Hackathon organized by JPMorgan Chase & Co. I am currently a Computer Engineering student at Vishwakarma Institute of Technology, Pune, and I am very interested in using technology to solve real-world problems that can make a positive impact.

runs.text: I am writing to apply for the Code for Good Hackathon organized by JPMorgan Chase & Co. I am currently a Computer Engineering student at Vishwakarma Institute of Technology, Pune, and I am very interested in using technology to solve real-world problems that can make a positive impact.

segments.text: Through my projects, I have gained hands-on experience in building practical and meaningful solutions.
segments.translated_text: Grâce à mes projets, j’ai acquis une expérience pratique dans la conception de solutions concrètes et significatives.
segments.correction: Grâce à mes projets, j’ai acquis une expérience pratique dans la conception de solutions concrètes et significatives.
segments.final_text: Grâce à mes projets, j’ai acquis une expérience pratique dans la conception de solutions concrètes et significatives.

runs.text: Through my projects, I have gained hands-on experience in building practical and meaningful solutions. For example, I developed an AI-based SQL assistant that helps users write database queries more efficiently, and a drawing tool that uses AI to simplify image editing. I have also worked on a blockchain-based system for transparent budget tracking and built a virtual CPU simulator to strengthen my understanding of core system concepts. These experiences have helped me become comfortable with both backend development and problem-solving at a deeper level.

segments.text: For example, I developed an AI-based SQL assistant that helps users write database queries more efficiently, and a drawing tool that uses AI to simplify image editing.

segments.text: I have actively participated in hackathons, where I learned how to work in fast-paced environments, collaborate with teams, and quickly turn ideas into working solutions.

runs.text: I have actively participated in hackathons, where I learned how to work in fast-paced environments, collaborate with teams, and quickly turn ideas into working solutions. Winning Best UI Design at the Inspiron Hackathon and receiving a Best Paper Award at IEEE OTCON were great learning experiences that motivated me to keep improving.

segments.text: Winning Best UI Design at the Inspiron Hackathon and receiving a Best Paper Award at IEEE OTCON were great learning experiences that motivated me to keep improving.
segments.translated_text: Remporter le prix du meilleur design d’interface utilisateur lors du Hackathon Inspiron et recevoir le prix du meilleur article à l’IEEE OTCON ont été d’excellentes expériences d’apprentissage qui m’ont motivé à continuer de progresser.

segments.text: What excites me most about Code for Good is the opportunity to work on challenges that have a real social impact.
segments.translated_text: Ce qui me passionne le plus dans Code for Good, c’est la possibilité de travailler sur des défis ayant un réel impact social.
segments.correction: Ce qui me passionne le plus dans Code for Good, c’est la possibilité de travailler sur des défis ayant un réel impact social.
segments.final_text: Ce qui me passionne le plus dans Code for Good, c’est la possibilité de travailler sur des défis ayant un réel impact social.

runs.text: What excites me most about Code for Good is the opportunity to work on challenges that have a real social impact. I enjoy working in teams, sharing ideas, and building solutions that are not only technically strong but also useful for people. I believe my technical background, along with my ability to adapt and work under pressure, will allow me to contribute effectively during the hackathon.
